title: Craftable Notch Apple
description: This mod adds the original enchanted golden apple craft to newer version of minecraft! not really any more stuff...
body:
Everybody wants the enchanted golden apple craft back, right? This lightweight mod restores the original "Notch Apple" recipe to the game, allowing you to feel that old Minecraft nostalgia again. It’s a great addition for survival servers or solo play to make the endgame feel rewarding again.

Features:

Classic Recipe: Restores the recipe using 8 Gold Blocks and 1 Apple.

Lightweight: No extra items or unnecessary code; just the recipe you miss.

Compatibility: Works with Forge, Fabric and NeoForge
